purpose: Verify the orchestrator regains control between subagent calls (multi-hop redelegation chain).

dispatch_order_constraints.reason: Clarify must surface unresolved items BEFORE the orchestrator dispatches any analyst — proves the orchestrator regained control between calls (the redelegation hop). If clarify didn't surface a [codebase] tag, the analyst would not be present at all; this constraint catches the case where it is present out of order.
